publications.title: CRISPR-Cas9 mediated genome editing in human embryonic stem cells
publications.abstract: We demonstrate efficient CRISPR-Cas9 mediated genome editing in human embryonic stem cells with minimal off-target effects. Our approach achieves 95% editing efficiency while maintaining cell viability and pluripotency markers.

publications.title: Machine learning approaches for protein structure prediction
publications.abstract: We present AlphaFold3, an improved deep learning system for protein structure prediction that achieves atomic accuracy for 98% of protein domains in the PDB.

publications.title: Quantum entanglement in superconducting qubits at room temperature
publications.abstract: We demonstrate sustained quantum entanglement in superconducting qubits operating at room temperature, opening new possibilities for practical quantum computing applications.

publications.title: Novel mRNA vaccine platform for rapid pandemic response
publications.abstract: We describe a modular mRNA vaccine platform enabling vaccine development within 48 hours of pathogen sequence identification, with demonstrated efficacy against multiple viral families.

publications.title: Transformer architectures for natural language understanding
publications.abstract: We introduce GPT-5, a 10 trillion parameter transformer model achieving human-level performance on complex reasoning tasks and demonstrating emergent capabilities in mathematical problem solving.
